member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.AppDomains
member.summary: AppDomains class.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.AppDomains.AvailableAppDomains
member.summary: Gets or Sets list of available appDomains.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackExecutor
member.summary: The service's internal storage for all the registered callbacks.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackExecutor.GetSessionContextProviderContainer(System.Boolean,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Get sessionContext, either from current thread or create one ad-ho for the callbacks execution.
member.param: In case of creating AdHoc sessionContext, should all provider needs to be populated?.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbacksService
member.summary: ConsoleService implementation.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbacksService.CallbackExecutor
member.summary: Gets or sets the callback executor. This member has no state, it is just to save the creation of it on every TriggerCallback call.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbacksService.StringToFlowEventType(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a flow name into enum. If input flow name is not found just return null since it is normal some custom defined flows are defined by the TP.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackWrapper
member.summary: The service's internal storage for all the registered callbacks.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackWrapper.Callback
member.summary: Gets or sets the callback delegate itself. This field will be null when CurrentAppDomain != CallbackAppDomainName. Because callbacks can be executed only from the appdomain it was created at.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackWrapperBase
member.summary: The service's internal storage for all the registered callbacks.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackWrapperBase.CallbackName
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the callback.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackWrapperBase.CallbackAppDomainName
member.summary: Gets or sets the AppDomain where this callback created in.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackWrapperBase.OwnerInstance
member.summary: Gets or sets the instance name that registered this callback.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackWrapperBase.RegistrantInstanceSessionContext
member.summary: Gets or sets the SessionContext of the instance registering this callback. This field will be null when CurrentAppDomain != CallbackAppDomainName. Because callbacks can be executed only from the appdomain it was created at.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackWrapperBase.CloneBaseMembers(Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackWrapperBase)
member.summary: Clone the member variables of this class. Will be called as part of the Clone() function of the derivatives.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.DutStorage`1
member.summary: Dff service local storage.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.DutStorage`1.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.DutStorage`1.#ctor(System.Func{`0})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.DutStorage`1.Reset(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Reset storage data.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.DutStorage`1.Get(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get stored object by session.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.DutStorage`1.Insert(`0,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Insert object to store by session.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.DutStorage`1.GetLock(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get a lock object by session.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.GenericCallbackWrapper
member.summary: The service's internal storage for all the registered callbacks.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.GenericCallbackWrapper.Callback
member.summary: Gets or sets the callback itself. This field will be null when CurrentAppDomain != CallbackAppDomainName. Because callbacks can be executed only from the appdomain it was created at.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.IDutStorage`1
member.summary: Dff service local storage.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.IDutStorage`1.Reset(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Reset storage data.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.IDutStorage`1.Get(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get stored object by session.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.IDutStorage`1.Insert(`0,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Insert object to store by session.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.IDutStorage`1.GetLock(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Get a lock object by session.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackDelegate
member.summary: CS callback delegate for calling C# from C++.
member.returns: string results from the callback. if no output results is needed from the callback simply return empty string. In case of failure callback will throw exception.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.RvCallbackDelegate
member.summary: RV callback delegate to be used by RV callbacks registration. Main usage from EVG was DEDC/ForceFlow but this is open for any usage.
member.param: the current instance exit port. the callback is allowed to override it.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.RegisterDeviceEndEvent(Prime.CallbacksService.IDeviceEndEvent,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Registers the given deviceEndEvent to be called during the device start.
member.param: The event to be called during the device end.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.UnregisterDeviceEndEvent(Prime.CallbacksService.IDeviceEndEvent,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Unregisters the given deviceEndEvent from being called during the device start.
member.param: The event to be unregistered from the device end.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.RegisterDeviceStartEvent(Prime.CallbacksService.IDeviceStartEvent,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Registers the given deviceStartEvent to be called during the device start.
member.param: The event to be called during the device start.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.UnregisterDeviceStartEvent(Prime.CallbacksService.IDeviceStartEvent,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Unregisters the given deviceStartEvent from being called during the device start.
member.param: The event to be unregistered from the device start.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.RegisterLotStartEvent(Prime.CallbacksService.ILotStartEvent,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Registers the given lotStartEvent to be called during the lot start.
member.param: The event to be called during the lot start.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.UnregisterLotStartEvent(Prime.CallbacksService.ILotStartEvent,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Unregisters the given lotStartEvent from being called during the lot start.
member.param: The event to be unregistered from the lot start.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.RegisterPreExecuteEvent(Prime.CallbacksService.IPreExecuteEvent,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Registers the given preExecuteEvent to be called before the Execute.
member.param: The event to be called before the Execute.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.UnregisterPreExecuteEvent(Prime.CallbacksService.IPreExecuteEvent,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Registers the given preExecuteEvent to be called before the Execute.
member.param: The event to be called before the Execute.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.RegisterPostExecuteEvent(Prime.CallbacksService.IPostExecuteEvent,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Registers the given postExecuteEvent to be called after the Execute.
member.param: The event to be called after the Execute.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.UnregisterPostExecuteEvent(Prime.CallbacksService.IPostExecuteEvent,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Registers the given postExecuteEvent to be called after the Execute.
member.param: The event to be called after the Execute.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.TriggerCallback(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Trigger a C# callback by name, Use this only if you registered with RegisterCallback method.
member.param: The name of the callback to trigger. Will throw if callback not exist.
list of arguments to pass to the callback function.
member.returns: string results from the callback. if no output results is needed from the callback simply return empty string. In case of failure callback will throw exception.

remarks.example:
This is a code example:
string resultValue = Prime.Base.ServiceStore<ICallbacksService>.Service.TriggerCallback(callbackName, arguments);

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.TriggerCallback``1(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer,System.Object[])
member.summary: Trigger a C# callback by name, Use this only if you registered with attribute [CallbackMethod].
member.param: The name of the callback to trigger. Will throw if callback not exist.
list of *objects* holding the arguments to pass to the callback function the first item in the object array is the session context.
member.returns: object results from the callback. if no output results is needed from the callback simply return null. In case of failure callback will throw exception.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.DoesCallbackExist(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Check if a callback was already registered.

remarks.example:
This is a code example:
bool resultValue = Prime.Base.ServiceStore<ICallbacksService>.Service.DoesCallbackExist(callbackName);

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.DoesRvCallbackExist(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Check if a RV callback was already registered.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.RegisterGuiCallback(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Register TOS Gui Callback with the function name.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ICallbacksService.AddFlowEvent(Prime.PlatformService.FlowEventType,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Adds a new callback to be executed at the given event type time. Callback needs to be previously registered.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.IDeviceEndEvent
member.summary: Defines the contract of an event to be executed after the Execution of the main flow.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.IDeviceEndEvent.EventName
member.summary: Gets the name of the current Event. This name must be unique. This name will be used for printing.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.IDeviceEndEvent.DeviceEnd(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: The event to be executed during the device end.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.IDeviceStartEvent
member.summary: Defines the contract of an event to be executed after the Execute.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.IDeviceStartEvent.EventName
member.summary: Gets the name of the current Event. This name must be unique. This name will be used for printing.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.IDeviceStartEvent.DeviceStart(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: The event to be executed during the device start.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.ILotStartEvent
member.summary: Defines the contract of an event to be executed after the Execute.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.ILotStartEvent.EventName
member.summary: Gets the name of the current Event. This name must be unique. This name will be used for printing.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.ILotStartEvent.LotStart(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: The event to be executed during the lot start.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.Internal.ICallbacksService
member.summary: Provides the services related to the test program.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.Internal.ICallbacksService.TriggerDeviceStartEventsAsync(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Execute the events registered to be triggered before the Device Start.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.Internal.ICallbacksService.TriggerDeviceEndEventsAsync(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Execute the events registered to be triggered before the Device End.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.Internal.ICallbacksService.TriggerLotStartEventsAsync(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Execute the events registered to be triggered before the Lot Start.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.Internal.ICallbacksService.TriggerPreExecuteEvents(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Execute the events registered to be triggered before the Execute.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.Internal.ICallbacksService.TriggerPostExecuteEvents(System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Execute the events registered to be triggered after the Execute.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.Internal.ICallbacksService.RegisterCallback(System.String,Prime.CallbacksService.CallbackDelegate,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Store a callback by name to be triggered later by C++ or C# code.
member.param: the name of the callback. C++ wil trigger it later by this name.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.Internal.ICallbacksService.RegisterCallback(System.Reflection.MethodInfo,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Store a callback by name to be triggered later by C++ or C# code.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.Internal.ICallbacksService.UnregisterCallback(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Unregister a callback from the system.
member.param: The name of the callback to unregister.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.Internal.ICallbacksService.RegisterRvCallback(System.String,Prime.CallbacksService.RvCallbackDelegate,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Store a callback by name to be triggered later by C++ or C# code.
member.param: the name of the callback. One registered it will be triggered and the post of EVERY instance.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.Internal.ICallbacksService.UnregisterRvCallback(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Unregister a callback from the system.
member.param: The name of the callback to unregister.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.Internal.ICallbacksService.TriggerRvCallbacks(System.Int32@,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: This function will be called by the Kernel's post instance to trigger all the registered RV callbacks (if any) .
member.param: The current exit port of the instance. Any RV callback is allowed to override the exit port while only the last executed callback takes priority.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.IPostExecuteEvent
member.summary: Defines the contract of an event to be executed after the Execute.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.IPostExecuteEvent.EventName
member.summary: Gets the name of the current Event. This name must be unique. This name will be used for printing.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.IPostExecuteEvent.PostExecute(System.Int32,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: The event to be executed after the Execute.
member.param: The exit port of the current instance's Execute.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.IPreExecuteEvent
member.summary: Defines the contract of an event to be executed before the Execute.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.IPreExecuteEvent.EventName
member.summary: Gets the name of the current Event. This name must be unique. This name will be used for printing.

member.name: M:Prime.CallbacksService.IPreExecuteEvent.PreExecute(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: The event to be executed before the Execute.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.PlatformCallbackProperties
member.summary: The properties of the FLowEvent to store i SharedStorage.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.PlatformCallbackProperties.CallbackName
member.summary: Gets or sets Name of the callback.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.PlatformCallbackProperties.CallbackArgs
member.summary: Gets or sets the callback arguments.

member.name: T:Prime.CallbacksService.RvCallbackWrapper
member.summary: The service's internal storage for all the registered callbacks.

member.name: P:Prime.CallbacksService.RvCallbackWrapper.RvCallback
member.summary: Gets or sets the RV callback delegate itself. This field will be null when CurrentAppDomain != CallbackAppDomainName. Because callbacks can be executed only from the appdomain it was created at.
